name: Beike Tripod TX1 Monopod 2 in 1 Multifunction
description: Made from aluminum alloy, manufactured with high technology and intensively tested.This camera tripod combines good performance and high-end design appearance, durable and trendy.

features.Key Features:: Material : Aluminium Alloy | Pegangan : Rubber 2 sisi | Ballhead 360 ° | Panjang terlipat : 44 cm | Tripod max tinggi: 184 cm | Tinggi max monopod: 108 cm | Jumlah kolom: 4 bagian | Max. diameter tabung: 25mm | Beban kapasitas: 8 kg | Berat : 1856g
features.What’s in the box?: 1x Tripod | 1x Ballhead | 3x Spike | 1x Pouch multifungsi | 1x Kunci L | 1x Phone holder | 1x Pouch Ballhead | 1x Tas penyimpanan
